title: sphaeroma pannosum
intro: Sphaeroma pannosum, also known as the globular millipede, is not a plant but a genus of crustaceans belonging to the family Sphaeromatidae. However, I will provide information on a plant that has a similar name, Sphaeroma (the plant), which I could not find. There is not enough information available about a plant species named Sphaeroma pannosum.
